description_long: This is a dark, ornate kettle with a prominent arched handle attached to the back and rising above the rim. The body is cylindrical with a flared, rounded base and is adorned with intricate, embossed decorative patterns, possibly floral or geometric, covering much of its surface. The front features a dramatic lion or beast head motif, with an open mouth that forms the spout, adding a striking and somewhat classical or mythological character. The handle is robust and metallic, designed for easy gripping and lifting, and is attached at two points for stability. No separate lid is visible, suggesting either an absent or integrated lid design. The overall finish is glossy and reflective, with a hard, metallic surface that suggests durability and a sense of luxury.
description: A dark, ornate metal kettle with a large arched handle and a dramatic lion-head spout, covered in intricate embossed patterns and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the lion-head spout and detailed decorative patterns on the body, with the arched handle visible behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated arched handle and the open mouth of the lion-head spout, as well as the sloped rim.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the full arch of the handle and the plain back of the kettle, with decorative patterns partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle's attachment and the side profile of the lion-head spout, with the ornate body patterns.
